howToOrder.heading: How to order your piece
howToOrder.body: Choose your piece, share your details, and we'll personally take care of the rest.
howToOrder.step1Desc: Explore our curated pieces and select the design that matches your space and intention.
howToOrder.step2Desc: Fill a simple form with your name, phone number, and location. Nothing more is needed.
howToOrder.step3Desc: We get in touch to confirm your order and arrange delivery tailored to your space.

tagline.headline: Objects shaped by restraint.
tagline.headlineSoft: Designed to exist quietly in your life, not dominate it.
tagline.headlineEnd: Made to age, not to be replaced.
tagline.craftDesc: Every piece is carefully checked and delivered with attention to quality and detail.
tagline.deliveryDesc: Quick and reliable shipping across Morocco, directly to your door.
tagline.supportDesc: We stay available to answer questions and guide you before and after your order.
tagline.returnsDesc: No questions asked. If it's not right, return it within 7 days easily.

about.headline: Made for spaces
about.heroBody: Inspired by the albatross — a symbol of freedom, balance, and intention. Contemporary furniture and home decor, rooted in Morocco. For those who live with purpose.
about.storyP1: Mipador started with a simple observation: the most beautiful spaces we'd ever been in had nothing to do with money. A riad in Fès. A workshop in the Atlas foothills. A terrace at golden hour with mint tea and nothing else.
about.storyP2: They had something harder to name — intention. Every object placed because it was loved. Every material chosen because it was honest. Every corner built to make you feel something.
about.storyP3: Just the feeling of a space that gives you energy, clarity, warmth, and freedom the moment you walk into it.
about.quote: "We buy things we don't need, to impress people we don't love."
about.quoteResponse: He was right. Most people do exactly that — and feel empty after.
about.manifesto: Mipador exists for the people who are done with that. Buy less. Choose honestly. Choose things because they make your life feel richer. Because they inspire you. Because they make your space feel like yours. Not to impress. Not to perform. Just to live better.

contact.heading: Get in
contact.body: Have a question or just want to say hello? Our studio is here to help you find the perfect fit.

faqs.heading: Questions.
faqs.body: Everything you need to know before bringing a Mipador piece into your space.

home.noFeatured: No pieces have been selected yet.
home.comingSoonBody: We don't rush what should be timeless. The next Mipador collection is being shaped slowly — by hand, by material, by patience.

footer.tagline: Handcrafted Moroccan furniture for spaces that feel alive — delivered across Morocco.
footer.journalBody: Inspirations, process notes, and new pieces — delivered slowly, intentionally.
footer.subscribedBody: You're now part of the Mipador world.

reviews.heading: Customer Reviews
reviews.noReviews: No reviews yet — be the first.
reviews.shareBody: Share your experience on WhatsApp — your words help others find what they're looking for.

vision.p1Body: It crosses entire oceans on a single current — carrying nothing extra, landing nowhere until it's exactly where it means to be. That image is the soul of Mipador. Not a brand built on accumulation. Not a brand built on performance. A brand built on the certainty that less, chosen with intention, means more.
vision.p2Lead: We design for people who live that way.
vision.p2Body: Pieces that earn their place in a space not through price tags or trend reports, but through honesty — the right material aging gracefully, the right proportion breathing quietly in the room, the right object that makes you feel at home the moment you walk in. Seating, tables, lighting, shelving, ceramic objects. Indoor and outdoor. Made to last, not to be replaced.
vision.p3Lead: Mipador is for those who move with purpose.
vision.p3Body: Who believe a positive mindset shapes a meaningful life. Who've stopped filling spaces and started choosing them. Who know the difference between a beautiful object and an honest one — and only want the second kind. Based in Casablanca, Morocco. Delivered wherever you are.

modelGrid.eyebrow: The spaces we live in shape the lives we live
modelGrid.heading: Where does Mipador live?
modelGrid.body: From the corner where ideas are born at 2AM to the terrace where friends stay too long after sunset — we create for spaces that hold real life.

coreFeatures.heading: Three principles.
coreFeatures.value1Desc: Nothing we make is accidental. Every proportion, every material, every finish is chosen because it earns its place in your space.
coreFeatures.value2Desc: Made by artisans in Morocco who learned their craft before they could read. Hands that understand wood, clay, leather, and iron differently than machines ever could.
coreFeatures.value3Desc: We create things that still feel good years later. Objects with soul, materials that age beautifully, spaces that help people breathe, create, connect, and feel present again.

featureGrid.heading: Morocco gives us everything.
featureGrid.touch3Desc: Spaces designed around emotion and air
featureGrid.touch4Desc: Open space. Endless perspective. Absolute calm.

brandPromise.heading: What Mipador
brandPromise.promise1: Every piece is made by hand, not by algorithm
brandPromise.promise2: Materials sourced honestly — wood, leather, clay, iron
brandPromise.promise3: Designed to age beautifully, not expire seasonally
brandPromise.promise4: Made in Morocco, by Moroccan hands
brandPromise.promise5: No empty luxury. No trend-chasing. No objects without meaning.
brandPromise.promise6: If you don't love it, you don't need it
brandPromise.imageCaption1: A tree branch. A flat stone. Sunlight through lattice.

seo.homeTitle: Moroccan Indoor Furniture & Home Decor Collection
seo.homeDesc: Mipador — contemporary furniture and home decor for spaces that make you feel free, alive, and at home. Premium indoor and outdoor collection, made to last. Delivered across Morocco.
seo.productsTitle: The Collection — Contemporary Furniture & Home Decor | Mipador
seo.productsDesc: Browse the Mipador collection — premium contemporary furniture and home decor for spaces that breathe. Seating, tables, lighting, shelving, and ceramic objects. Delivered across Morocco.
seo.aboutTitle: Our Story — We Build Worlds, Not Just Furniture
seo.aboutDesc: Mipador was built for people who want more freedom, warmth, and meaning in the way they live. Discover the story and philosophy behind every piece.
seo.contactDesc: Get in touch with Mipador Studio — questions about our collection, custom pieces, delivery across Morocco, or just to say hello.
seo.faqsTitle: FAQ — Furniture, Orders & Delivery in Morocco
seo.faqsDesc: Everything you need to know about Mipador — materials, ordering, delivery across Morocco, payment methods, and our 7-day return policy.
